induction_input: The cat the dog chased escaped.
The book the student read surprised.
The car the mechanic fixed broke.
The bird the cat caught flew.
The meal the chef prepared burned.
l2_sentences: The cat, which was sleeping on the couch, suddenly woke up.
The book that I borrowed from the library is due tomorrow.
The man who lives next door is a famous musician.
The car that parked in front of our house belongs to my aunt.
The children who played in the park went home for dinner.
